issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for Vertex AI operations.
The skill assumes a Python environment and GCP credentials, limiting use on non-Python agents.

scenarios.name: Legacy SDK to unified google-genai migration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to stay on google-cloud-aiplatform or pick google-generativeai and misses the GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI=true toggle plus genai.Client/models.generate_content surface the rubric requires.

scenarios.name: 5M-row batch translation pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposes parallel streaming calls or Dataflow; treatment uses BatchPredictionJob.submit with the documented JSONL request shape, GCS output, and bq load round-trip with cost rationale.
